title: [Let's Do] WilderNature
description: Wilder Nature introduces immersive wildlife, hunting systems, bounties, and trophies, bringing dynamic creatures and adventure-driven rewards into your world.
body:
![Wilder Nature](https://lets-do.ch/assets/mod-logos/wildernature.png)

Unleashed Wild & Bountiful Bounties

The mod that adds a variety of wildlife to the Let's Do Collection


"Tame the untamed"


Wilder Nature adds a *wild* variety of tamable and untamable wildlife, with intricate visuals and functions that enhance vanilla immersion. Breathe, steady yourself, and face any challenge with valor.
Venture forth. Show no fear.
Wilder Nature expands the roster of wildlife within the Let's Do Collection and breathes life into the world of Minecraft through dynamic creatures and hunting systems.
## Brave the Wilderness
- Set sight on and interact with the various wildlife found across your world - New meats obtained by hunting the new wildlife - New friends to make on your journeys
Grab your blunderbuss, the hunt awaits.
## Fulfill Bounties and Collect Rewards
- Use the Bounty Board to obtain cool rewards from hunts. Temporarily disabled in 1.21.1 - Obtain a Bison Horn, the best way to show you're a master huntsman - Turn fish into oil and fuel the fire to keep you warm at night
The hunt rewards only the valorous.
## Decorative Elements
- Cool banners to decorate your hunting lodge - Trophies of your kills that have useful effects - A Stylin' Purple Hat, because why not?

Face the wilderness.

Tame the untamable.

Reap the rewards.


Dedicated to MissLilitu


Many of the animals featured in this mod were originally created by Nog and serve as the foundation of Wilder Nature, used with permission. More of their work can be found here: https://mcmodels.net/vendors/24/nog


# The Let’s Do Collection

# Support & Community

Let’s Do grows through its community.


GitHub • Discord • Patreon
